title: Thestra no Jijou: The Curse of the Sunken Temple
logline: A young Summoner must descend into the ancient Sunken Temple beneath Thestra Village to break a curse that is slowly corrupting the land, using captured monsters to survive.
setting: Thestra Village is a remote mountain settlement isolated by a perpetual storm. Beneath the village lies the Sunken Temple, a multilayered dungeon built by an extinct civilization to contain a primordial evil. The curse manifests as a withering blight that spreads from the temple's depths, warping creatures and driving away the light.

acts.name: Act 1: The Blight Appears
beats: Player arrives at Thestra Village (town map).
Meet Elder Aris who explains the blight and gives the main quest 'The Temple Blight'.
Learn about Healer Mina who went missing in the temple; receive the side quest 'Missing Healer' from Elder Aris or a villager (implied).
Enter the Sunken Temple Floor 1: Hall of Echoes. Navigate traps and weak monsters.
On Floor 1, find the entrance to Floor 2 and also discover Healer Mina wounded in a side room; complete 'Missing Healer' (she gives a reward and a clue).
Return to town to report to Elder Aris. He suggests finding three tokens for a cleansing ritual – triggers 'The Three Tokens' quest from Healer Mina when you talk to her again.
mapsUsed: Sunken Temple Floor 1: Hall of Echoes
acts.climax: Rescuing Healer Mina and learning about the three tokens needed to break the curse.

acts.name: Act 2: The Three Tokens
beats: Accept 'The Three Tokens' from Healer Mina in town.
Descend to Sunken Temple Floor 2: Vault of Decay. Collect the Token of Earth from its boss – a decayed golem.
Proceed to Sunken Temple Floor 3: Chamber of Sacrifice. Collect the Token of Fire from the Guardian Golem (mini-boss).
Return to town to heal and re-equip.
Descend to Sunken Temple Floor 4: Sanctum of the Fallen. Collect the Token of Shadow from a hidden altar, guarded by a powerful curse-touched spirit.
mapsUsed: Sunken Temple Floor 2: Vault of Decay
Sunken Temple Floor 3: Chamber of Sacrifice
Sunken Temple Floor 4: Sanctum of the Fallen
acts.climax: Obtaining all three tokens and learning that the final obstacle is the Cursebeast that guards the source of the blight.

acts.name: Act 3: Purification
beats: Return to Healer Mina with the three tokens; she performs a ritual to create a Purification Stone.
Ascend (or descend) to the inner chamber on Floor 4 where the Cursebeast lurks.
Boss battle: Cursebeast – a massive amalgam of corrupted creatures and dark energy. Uses Shadow and debuffs.
After victory, use the Purification Stone to break the source of the blight.
The storm clears; the village celebrates. The Summoner's surviving creatures are honored, and a large EXP reward is awarded.
mapsUsed: Sunken Temple Floor 4: Sanctum of the Fallen
acts.climax: The final confrontation with the Cursebeast and the purification of the temple.

cast.name: Elder Aris
cast.concept: The wise village elder who knows the temple's history and gives the main quests.

cast.name: Healer Mina
cast.concept: A brave young healer who got lost in the temple; once rescued, she provides the token quest and healing services.

cast.name: Shopkeeper Garrick
cast.concept: Grumpy but helpful merchant selling basic supplies and monster-taming equipment.

cast.name: Guardian Golem
cast.concept: A stone construct animated by ancient magic, guarding the Token of Fire on Floor 3. Immune to physical damage until its elemental core is exposed.
cast.location: Sunken Temple Floor 3: Chamber of Sacrifice

cast.name: Cursebeast
cast.concept: The final boss – a twisted mass of corrupted life and shadow, the physical manifestation of the blight. Uses poison, weaken, and berserk states.
cast.location: Sunken Temple Floor 4: Sanctum of the Fallen

maps.title: Thestra Village
maps.concept: A small wooden village surrounded by dark forest and a perpetual storm. A single well, an elder's house, a shop, and a healer's hut before she goes missing.

maps.title: Sunken Temple Floor 1: Hall of Echoes
maps.concept: First floor of the temple, filled with cracked stone corridors, glowing fungi, and trapped alcoves. Echoes of past souls whisper warnings. Home to weak spirits and crawlers.

maps.title: Sunken Temple Floor 2: Vault of Decay
maps.concept: Deeper level where decay and rot have taken hold. Pools of sludge, crumbling statues, and poison spores. Contains the Token of Earth guarded by a decayed golem.

maps.title: Sunken Temple Floor 3: Chamber of Sacrifice
maps.concept: A wide chamber with an altar at the center, surrounded by braziers. The Guardian Golem stands before the Token of Fire. Floor has fire traps and lava cracks.

maps.title: Sunken Temple Floor 4: Sanctum of the Fallen
maps.concept: The deepest level, a dark sanctum where the blight originates. Walls are veined with black crystal. The Cursebeast dwells here, and the Token of Shadow lies on a pedestal in a side room.

quests.name: The Temple Blight
quests.summary: Investigate the source of the withering blight in the Sunken Temple and find a way to stop it.

quests.name: Missing Healer
quests.summary: Find Healer Mina who disappeared into the Sunken Temple while trying to help the sick.

quests.name: The Three Tokens
quests.summary: Collect three ancient tokens (Earth, Fire, Shadow) from the Sunken Temple floors to perform a cleansing ritual.

ending: After defeating the Cursebeast and using the Purification Stone, the blight vanishes. The sun breaks through the storm for the first time in years. Thestra Village begins to recover, and the Summoner is hailed as a hero. All surviving summoned creatures are celebrated, and the player receives a massive bank of EXP, unlocking new summoning options. The temple is sealed, but rumors of other ancient ruins persist...
